     The Numbers Business Report

Paul (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $37,412,945Details
International Box Office $63,749,161
Worldwide Box Office $101,162,106
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,702,275
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,407,499
Total $17,109,774
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two sci-fi geeks take a pilgrimage to America's UFO heartland. While there, they accidentally meet an alien who brings them on an insane road trip that alters their universe forever. For the past 60 years, an alien named Paul has been hanging out at a top-secret military base. For reasons unknown, the space-traveling smart ass decides to escape the compound and hop on the first vehicle out of town - a rented RV containing Earthlings Graeme Willy and Clive Gollings. Chased by federal agents and the fanatical father of a young woman that they accidentally kidnap, Graeme and Clive hatch a fumbling escape plan to return Paul to his mother ship. And as two nerds struggle to help, one little green man might just take his fellow outcasts from misfits to intergalactic heroes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,043,310 (34.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,802 opening theaters/2,806 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,426,084

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 18th, 2011 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: August 9th, 2011 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language including sexual references, and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2146, 11/10/2010)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Motion Capture Performance
Plot point: Conspiracy Theory, Death of a Pet, Escape, Friendly Alien on Earth, Fugitive / On the Run, Non-Chronological, Religious, Road Trip, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Relativity Media, Working Title Films, Big Talk Pictures
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English, English

Synopsis

Two sci-fi geeks take a pilgrimage to America's UFO heartland. While there, they accidentally meet an alien who brings them on an insane road trip that alters their universe forever. For the past 60 years, an alien named Paul has been hanging out at a top-secret military base. For reasons unknown, the space-traveling smart ass decides to escape the compound and hop on the first vehicle out of town - a rented RV containing Earthlings Graeme Willy and Clive Gollings. Chased by federal agents and the fanatical father of a young woman that they accidentally kidnap, Graeme and Clive hatch a fumbling escape plan to return Paul to his mother ship. And as two nerds struggle to help, one little green man might just take his fellow outcasts from misfits to intergalactic heroes.
